name: I. F. Stone
description: American investigative journalist, writer, and author
abstract: Isadore Feinstein Stone (December 24, 1907 – June 18, 1989) was an American investigative journalist, writer, and author. Known for his politically progressive views, Stone is best remembered for I.

about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee compares the woman's work to I.F. Stone's ('similar to I. F. Stone') but provides no evidence of personal interaction, meeting, or direct relationship with I.F. Stone himself.
